subcodes.first_line: O Baqir! I have heard the lamentation of your heart, the cry of your inner being, the trembling of your conscience and the agitation of your body, and We have answered you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا باقر قد سمعت ضجیج قلبک و صریخ فوادک و تزلزل سرک و تبلبل جسدک و اجبناک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
